## 🤔 What is this?

A growing library of GPT Image 2 prompts collected from X/Twitter, with original authors credited and a working render attached to every entry. Use it to skip blank-canvas syndrome and steal a starting point that's already proven to work.

Every prompt has a **🚀 Try it now** button that opens the prompt detail page on [aiistudio.com](https://aiistudio.com) — copy, tweak, and run it directly.

```text
Ultra-realistic cozy Korean kitchen portrait of a beautiful Korean woman standing beside the kitchen counter at night, slightly turning toward the camera with a soft playful smile while holding a metal whisk above her shoulder. Wearing an oversized fluffy pastel pink hoodie, sleeves covering part of her hands, cozy feminine aesthetic. Long silky black hair flowing naturally, glossy eyes, soft blush makeup, natural skin texture, dreamy youthful Korean beauty style.
Warm ambient kitchen lighting mixed with subtle iPhone flash photography for realistic highlights and soft cinematic shadows. Modern compact Korean apartment kitchen with cream countertops, pastel baking tools, mixing bowls with cake batter, flour bags, cute pink kitchen accessories, tiny warm table lamp, photo cards on the wall, soft decorative flowers, nighttime city lights visible through the window.
Romantic slice-of-life atmosphere, candid pose, cozy late-night baking vibe, soft pink and cream color palette, shallow depth of field, cinematic framing, highly detailed, photorealistic Korean room aesthetic, intimate warm mood, realistic flash photography, soft glow, lifestyle editorial feel.
```

The background is a blurry indoor stadium with bright overhead lights, spectators, and flags. #### 3. FACS 3x3 redhead expression collage

<a href="https://aiistudio.com/en/prompt/2055027622422175817?utm_source=github&utm_medium=readme&utm_campaign=prompt-link"><img src="https://cdn.aiistudio.com/twitter/2055027622422175817/0.jpg" alt="FACS 3x3 redhead expression collage" width="560"></a>

<details><summary><strong>📝 Prompt</strong> (click to expand)</summary>

```text
{
  "objective": "Create a 3x3 portrait collage inspired by expressive fashion photography, using FACS (Facial Action Coding System) to define each facial expression. The subject is an extremely beautiful redhead woman with green eyes, captured in candid smartphone-style colored photography",

  "aspect_ratio": "1:1",

  "composition": {
    "layout": "3x3 grid (9 equal portraits)",
    "framing": "tight head-and-shoulders portraits",
    "style": "clean grid with minimal spacing, similar framing across all panels",
    "consistency": "same subject, same lighting, slight variation in pose and angle"
  },

  "subject": {
    "person": "adult woman",
    "appearance": {
      "hair": "natural red hair, slightly wet or textured",
      "eyes": "green eyes, highly expressive",
      "beauty": "extreme beauty, sharp yet soft features",
      "skin": "natural texture, not over-smoothed"
    },
    "outfit": {
      "top": "low-cut cream tank top", 
      "style": "minimal, clean"
    }
  },

  "facs_expressions": [
    {
      "panel": 1,
      "action_units": ["AU4 (brow lowerer)", "AU9 (nose wrinkler)", "AU10 (upper lip raiser)"],
      "description": "slight snarl expression"
    },
    {
      "panel": 2,
      "action_units": ["AU25 (lips part)", "AU26 (jaw drop)", "AU19 (tongue show)"],
      "description": "playful tongue out"
    },
    {
      "panel": 3,
      "action_units": ["AU1 (inner brow raiser)", "AU2 (outer brow raiser)", "AU24 (lip pressor)"],
      "description": "soft serious look with hands together"
    },
    {
      "panel": 4,
      "action_units": ["AU5 (upper lid raiser)", "AU25 (lips part)"],
      "description": "relaxed upward gaze with hands in hair"
    },
    {
      "panel": 5,
      "action_units": ["AU12 (lip corner puller)", "AU6 (cheek raiser)"],
      "description": "subtle natural smile"
    },
    {
      "panel": 6,
      "action_units": ["AU4 (brow lowerer)", "AU10 (upper lip raiser)", "AU25 (lips part)"],
      "description": "intense biting lip expression"
    },
    {
      "panel": 7,
      "action_units": ["AU18 (lip pucker)", "AU22 (lip funneler)"],
      "description": "playful fish face"
    },
    {
      "panel": 8,
      "action_units": ["AU25 (lips part)", "AU26 (jaw drop)", "AU5 (upper lid raiser)"],
      "description": "surprised open-mouth expression"
    },
    {
      "panel": 9,
      "action_units": ["AU1 (inner brow raiser)", "AU15 (lip corner depressor)"],
      "description": "soft melancholic or tired expression with hand on face"
    }
  ],

  "visual_style": {
    "genre": "editorial portrait photography",
    "color": "full color (not black and white)",
    "quality": "smartphone candid",
    "texture": [
      "visible grain",
      "natural skin imperfections",
      "slight noise"
    ],
    "color_tone": "neutral to slightly warm tones"
  },

  "lighting": {
    "style": "direct flash or simple frontal lighting",
    "effect": "slight harsh shadows, natural highlights, candid feel"
  },

  "camera": {
    "device": "smartphone",
    "lens": "standard phone lens",
    "distance": "close portrait distance",
    "feel": "handheld, slightly imperfect framing"
  },

  "quality_targets": {
    "look": "authentic, expressive portrait collage",
    "focus": "facial expressions driven by FACS accuracy",
    "consistency": "same subject and lighting across all panels"
  },

  "negative_constraints": [
    "no black and white",
    "no studio perfection",
    "no over-retouched skin",
    "no inconsistent face",
    "no heavy makeup",
    "no cinematic lighting"
  ]
}
```

</details>

#### 7. Smartphone gym mirror selfie portrait

<a href="https://aiistudio.com/en/prompt/2053343022218100809?utm_source=github&utm_medium=readme&utm_campaign=prompt-link"><img src="https://cdn.aiistudio.com/twitter/2053343022218100809/0.jpg" alt="Smartphone gym mirror selfie portrait" width="560"></a>

<details><summary><strong>📝 Prompt</strong> (click to expand)</summary>

```text
A realistic smartphone mirror selfie of a young woman in her 20s sitting on a black workout bench inside a modern gym. She is positioned on the right side of the vertical frame, leaning back slightly, holding a smartphone in front of the center of her face while taking a mirror selfie. She wears a dark gray baseball cap with the brim facing forward, and long straight black hair falls naturally from underneath the cap. Her expression is calm, cool, and slightly distant, with her eyes looking toward the phone screen or her reflection. Her lips are naturally closed and partly hidden by the phone, with no obvious smile, as if this was captured casually right after a workout.  She wears a black bandeau or one-shoulder strappy athletic top, close-fitting with slight wrinkles and matte elastic texture, leaving the shoulders, collarbones, and upper chest edges exposed. The bottom is a black high-waisted mini skirt or skort, fitted around the waist and hips, naturally folded and partially hidden by the seated pose near the upper thighs. She wears brown tall boots. One leg is bent and lifted across the foreground, while the other leg stretches diagonally toward the lower left of the frame, creating a strong diagonal composition and subtle wide-angle leg elongation.  Her skin tone is fair warm ivory, softly bright under cool white gym lighting but still realistic. Visible skin includes part of the face, neck, both shoulders, collarbones, upper chest edges, upper arms, forearms, hands, a small section of the waist, large areas of both thighs, knees, and parts of the lower legs. The abdomen and hip edges are partly covered by clothing and the seated pose; the buttocks are not visible or are blocked by the bench and skirt. The skin should look smooth and delicate but not plastic, with natural softness on the thighs and knees. It should feel visually cool, fine, lightly elastic, and human, with subtle color variation around the joints.  The setting is a modern gym with gray walls, dark gray floor tiles, a black gym bench, equipment bars, a workout bench on the left, and a large rounded-rectangle glass window in the background reflecting blue-white indoor lights. The main light comes from large overhead cool-white LED panels, with blue-white reflections from the glass window on the left. The light creates broad, direct highlights on the shoulders, arms, thighs, and floor, while shadows come naturally from ceiling light and equipment obstruction. Keep mirror scratches, glass streaks, slight glare, mild compression, and small overexposed highlights.  The photography style should feel like a real smartphone small-sensor wide-angle mirror selfie, vertical composition around 2:3 or 3:4, low-to-mid mirror viewpoint, with the subject slightly right-weighted and the legs extending toward the lower left. Deep depth of field keeps both the subject and gym equipment relatively clear, with a little haze from mirror and glass reflections. Do not make it a polished commercial studio image. Keep the casual social media feeling, slight framing imperfection, background clutter, accidental reflections, and authentic indoor digital texture.
```

</details>

</details>

#### 9. 3x3 candid Asian woman tank top photo dump

<a href="https://aiistudio.com/en/prompt/2052858579666038948?utm_source=github&utm_medium=readme&utm_campaign=prompt-link"><img src="https://cdn.aiistudio.com/twitter/2052858579666038948/0.jpg" alt="3x3 candid Asian woman tank top photo dump" width="560"></a>

<details><summary><strong>📝 Prompt</strong> (click to expand)</summary>

```text
{
  "objective": "Create a 3x3 editorial-style smartphone photo collage of an incredibly beautiful and sensual adult Asian woman, captured in candid poses with a soft, natural, slightly grainy aesthetic, wearing a different colored tank top with a deep neckline in each panel",

  "aspect_ratio": "4:5",

  "composition": {
    "layout": "3x3 grid (9 panels)",
    "framing": "mix of close-ups, mid-shots, and cropped portraits",
    "style": "candid contact-sheet collage",
    "alignment": "slightly imperfect spacing like a casual photo dump"
  },

  "subject": {
    "person": "adult Asian woman",
    "appearance": {
      "beauty": "extremely beautiful, soft yet striking features",
      "hair": "long dark hair, slightly messy or naturally styled",
      "expression": "playful, sensual, relaxed, candid"
    },
    "wardrobe": {
      "rule": "each panel features a DIFFERENT colored tank top",
      "style": "fitted tank tops with deep neckline",
      "colors": [
        "black",
        "white",
        "red",
        "beige",
        "olive green",
        "soft pink",
        "navy",
        "gray",
        "cream"
      ]
    }
  },

  "poses": [
    "resting chin on hand, soft gaze",
    "hands behind head, relaxed stretch",
    "looking sideways with subtle expression",
    "eyes closed smiling naturally",
    "hand near collarbone or neck",
    "slight lean with hair falling naturally",
    "adjusting hair casually",
    "resting head on hand with soft smile",
    "blowing a kiss or playful gesture"
  ],

  "environment": {
    "setting": "simple indoor wall backdrop",
    "background": "neutral wall (white or light beige)",
    "props": "none"
  },

  "visual_style": {
    "genre": "smartphone candid photography",
    "quality": "intentionally lower resolution",
    "texture": [
      "visible grain",
      "film noise",
      "slight blur",
      "compression artifacts"
    ],
    "color_tone": "slightly warm or muted tones"
  },

  "lighting": {
    "style": "direct flash or simple room light",
    "effect": "slight harshness with soft shadows, casual look"
  },

  "camera": {
    "device": "smartphone",
    "angle": "handheld, slightly inconsistent angles",
    "focus": "not perfectly sharp, slight softness",
    "imperfections": [
      "minor motion blur",
      "uneven exposure",
      "flash hotspots"
    ]
  },

  "quality_targets": {
    "look": "authentic, unpolished, candid",
    "feel": "natural, intimate, spontaneous",
    "aesthetic": "modern social media photo dump"
  },

  "negative_constraints": [
    "no studio lighting",
    "no high-end polish",
    "no heavy retouching",
    "no perfect symmetry",
    "no multiple people per panel",
    "no cluttered background",
    "no unrealistic skin smoothing"
  ]
}

#### 14. East Asian lazy morning bedroom portrait

<a href="https://aiistudio.com/en/prompt/2051878844160975033?utm_source=github&utm_medium=readme&utm_campaign=prompt-link"><img src="https://cdn.aiistudio.com/twitter/2051878844160975033/0.jpg" alt="East Asian lazy morning bedroom portrait" width="560"></a>

```text
A casual, authentic lifestyle photograph shot from a slightly tilted high angle looking down at a cozy bed. A young slim female was resting on her back, exuding a lazy, intimate weekend morning vibe. She has long, slightly messy straight black hair with subtle pink highlights spreading softly on a purple pillow, framed by neat front bangs. Her face features a soft East Asian makeup aesthetic with prominent pink blush and slightly parted glossy lips, her soft gaze looking directly into the camera. She is wearing a white ribbed cotton camisole with front buttons and lace trim, slightly pulled up at the waist, paired with light pink satin pajama shorts. Her right arm is raised casually behind her head, exposing her smooth underarm and shoulder, while her left knee is gently bent, revealing a fair, soft upper thigh. The visible skin on her arms, chest, stomach, and legs appears smooth and touchable, illuminated by soft, diffused physical daylight spilling from a window on the left. A silver charm bracelet hangs on her left wrist. The setting is an intimate bedroom heavily styled in pastel tones. She lies on ruffled pastel purple pillows and a white blanket with subtle purple floral patterns. Two white plush bunnies sit near her head. In the slightly out-of-focus lower right foreground, a wooden nightstand holds a glass of lemon water, a small pink digital clock showing 8:47, an earbuds case, and an ELLE magazine. Captured with a 35mm lens at a moderate aperture, creating a natural, slightly imperfect snapshot feel with soft daylight and gentle roll-off shadows, preserving the authentic, tranquil energy of a slow morning.
```

#### 16. Y2K flash fashion portrait of woman

<a href="https://aiistudio.com/en/prompt/2051284816054858055?utm_source=github&utm_medium=readme&utm_campaign=prompt-link"><img src="https://cdn.aiistudio.com/twitter/2051284816054858055/0.jpg" alt="Y2K flash fashion portrait of woman" width="560"></a>

<details><summary><strong>📝 Prompt</strong> (click to expand)</summary>

```text
A close-range flash-fashion portrait, with the subject's body cutting diagonally across the frame. Her face is positioned low on the left side, while the body extends from the left shoulder, neck, chest, and abdomen toward the upper hips and faded blue denim on the right. The composition should feel tilted, unstable, and off-balance, like a 90s/Y2K fashion magazine, fitting-room, or temporary studio flash snapshot. Do not make it a clean commercial studio image.

The subject is a young adult woman in her 20s. She has dark brown, almost black hair, loosely tied or half-up, with many messy flyaway strands falling over her forehead and around the face. The flash catches tiny highlights in the loose hair. Her face remains on the left side of the frame. Her eyes look directly into the camera with a cool, distant, slightly dazed expression. Her lips are relaxed, softly closed or slightly parted, as if she had just turned toward the lens when the flash fired. Her makeup follows a 90s/Y2K fashion look: pale matte base, slight pink blush, minimal delicate eye makeup, natural lashes, nude-pink or soft rose lips, with a slightly washed-out flash-lit film complexion.

She wears a red-and-white gingham strappy crop top with thin straps, a fitted cropped structure, slight wrinkles along the bust edge, and a small side tie extending outward. The bottom is a pair of faded light blue denim overalls or loose jeans, half-worn and low-slung, with the white inner waistband, metal buttons, seams, and strap construction visible. The denim should look heavy, washed, textured, and naturally folded, as if it has not been fully adjusted yet. She wears glossy brown leather gloves: one gloved hand rests near the waist or hip, while the other gloved hand lifts toward the upper-right of the frame. Around the neck and collarbones are layered delicate metal necklaces with small pendants and a heart-shaped charm.

Visible skin includes the face, neck, collarbones, shoulders, upper arms, upper chest edge, partial side chest, large abdomen area, side waist, skin around the navel, upper hip edge, and the low-waist denim area. The back, buttocks, and full legs are not visible. Her skin tone is fair and warm, appearing pinkish-white and slightly overexposed under the hard flash against the cold blue-green background. The skin should look smooth, soft, and warm, while keeping subtle real texture, natural abdominal transitions, and navel detail. It should feel like fine skin briefly lit by direct flash, not glossy plastic or heavily airbrushed.

The photography style is a 90s/Y2K film-flash snapshot, as if shot with a point-and-shoot film camera, early digital camera, or phone with a film emulation filter. A strong direct flash fires from slightly above-left of the camera, creating hard highlights on the forehead, nose bridge, cheeks, collarbones, upper chest edge, center abdomen, arms, and glossy brown leather gloves. The body casts a harder shadow onto the cold blue-green background. Keep visible film grain, slight overexposure, cool cyan-blue shadows, rough edges, and a scanned-film feeling. The background should stay plain and minimal, without furniture or complex environmental elements.

The mood feels like a temporary shoot where she had not fully adjusted the denim overalls yet; the red-and-white gingham crop top and loose denim are frozen mid-styling as the flash fires early, catching her cool gaze, messy hair, unfinished gesture, and raw clothing details. Aesthetic direction: 90s flash fashion, Y2K editorial, raw denim styling, cropped body portrait, cold blue film scan.

Negative prompt: perfect studio beauty shot, commercial ecommerce photo, plastic skin, heavy airbrushing, soft glamour lighting, perfect symmetry, oversexualized, exaggerated body, full body standing pose, clean minimal fashion ad, complex background, low detail fabric, bad anatomy, extra fingers, deformed hands, warped waist, uncanny face, smooth AI gloss.
```

</details>

#### 17. East asian phone-flash bedroom selfie

<a href="https://aiistudio.com/en/prompt/2051202480793686229?utm_source=github&utm_medium=readme&utm_campaign=prompt-link"><img src="https://cdn.aiistudio.com/twitter/2051202480793686229/0.jpg" alt="East asian phone-flash bedroom selfie" width="560"></a>

<details><summary><strong>📝 Prompt</strong> (click to expand)</summary>

```text
A high-angle front-camera phone selfie of a young woman in her 20s sitting or half-lying on a white bed. The camera is held slightly above her face, slightly offset to the right, looking downward in a close half-body composition where her face and upper body fill most of the frame. One eye is open and looking directly into the camera while the other eye is playfully winking. Her lips are slightly parted, giving a cute but slightly defiant and teasing expression. Preserve the small face, pointed chin, soft nose bridge, strong nose-tip highlight, delicate under-eye detail, and East Asian social-media selfie makeup style: pale luminous base, soft pink blush, slim natural brows, elongated eyeliner, glossy muted rose lips, and a tiny heart sticker or small cheek decoration.  She has deep black long straight hair with airy bangs falling across the forehead, loose strands touching the cheeks, neck, and collarbones. The hair should look smooth and glossy but slightly messy, as if casually adjusted while on the bed. She wears a black-and-white zebra-print low-cut thin-strap camisole with a gathered or twisted front detail; the fabric fits closely and the pattern bends along the body shape. Over it, she wears a medium-blue washed denim jacket slipping off the shoulders, with loose sleeves covering part of the arms. Visible skin includes the face, neck, collarbones, shoulders, upper chest, décolletage, arms, hands, small areas around the waist side, and upper thigh. The skin tone is fair with a cool pink undertone, appearing porcelain-bright under direct phone flash, with a smooth, soft, dewy, slightly glossy tactile quality. Strong small highlight patches appear on the nose bridge, collarbones, chest, and shoulders.  One hand holds the phone while the other hand is close to the camera making a middle-finger gesture, creating mild wide-angle hand distortion. The background is a private bedroom bed scene with white pillows, wrinkled white bedding, a pink bunny plush toy, a brown animal cushion, and a warm gray-beige wall. Lighting comes mainly from close direct phone flash or strong frontal fill, while the room ambient light remains weak and soft; the white bedding bounces a little light back onto the skin. Keep the image realistic and casual, with phone-shot texture, slight beauty-filter smoothing, local flash highlights, messy hair strands, bedding wrinkles, plush toys, and an imperfect handheld composition. Avoid making it look like a polished commercial studio portrait.
```

```text
Transform [NAME] into a soft, atmospheric cloud composition while preserving the subject's recognizable facial features, expression, and identity.

Ensure the transformation is symbolic rather than literal, avoid hard edges, skin texture, or sharp details. The subject should feel like it is emerging from or dissolving into the clouds.
Maintain facial proportions, eyes, smile, and key features clearly visible through the cloud structure.
Style: dreamy, ethereal, surreal, cinematic
Lighting: natural sunlight, soft glow, volumetric light
Color palette: sky blue, white, soft gradients
Mood: peaceful, uplifting, inspirational
Add subtle cloud layers around and within the face for a seamless blend. Background should be a clean blue sky with soft cloud gradients.
High resolution, ultra-realistic cloud texture, smooth blending, no text, no watermark.
```

</details>

```text
Create a realistic vertical handheld indoor cosplay portrait of a young adult woman seated beside a large nighttime hotel-room window. She wears a vivid royal-blue and metallic-gold Chinese-inspired fighting game costume: a fitted qipao-style bodice with puff sleeves, ornate gold trim, curved structured chest panels, a high collar with gold frog closures, a wide white embroidered waist sash, and a matching high-slit blue skirt with gold edging. Add large white fabric hair buns and ribbon-like side pieces with small gold accents, pearl-like earrings, and oversized glossy black wrist cuffs with silver cone spikes.

Her face should keep an East Asian idol-inspired cosplay beauty style: fair porcelain skin with a warm pink undertone, large glossy eyes, precise black winged eyeliner, warm brown eyeshadow, softly flushed cheeks, luminous nose and cheek highlights, and vivid glossy red lips slightly parted. Her dark brown-black hair is pulled into twin side buns with soft bangs and face-framing strands. She looks directly into the camera with a calm, confident, lightly flirtatious expression.

The visible skin includes the face, neck, upper chest, cleavage, partial shoulders near the sleeves, forearms, hands, upper thighs, outer hips, and knees. The skin should look smooth, fair, and softly satin-like to the touch, with subtle natural tonal variation rather than plastic perfection. Strong frontal camera flash creates crisp white highlights across the face, chest, hands, and thighs, while warm hotel ceiling lights leave soft amber shadows.

Pose her seated on a bed or low lounge surface near the window ledge. One arm is extended and braced against the marble ledge, the other hand rests near the collarbone. Her torso angles slightly toward the camera, her head tilts gently, and one leg comes forward through the high slit. Keep the pose asymmetrical and naturally staged, like a real social-media cosplay photo taken after dressing up, not a perfect commercial studio shot.

Use a close vertical composition, medium close framing from upper thighs to head, with a slight handheld tilt. The camera feels like a phone or compact digital camera using direct flash, around a 24-28mm equivalent lens, with moderate depth of field. The subject is sharp, while the dark city view through the window remains slightly softer, showing scattered lit building windows. Include a modern hotel-room background: large floor-to-ceiling glass, white pillow on a window bench, white marble or stone ledge, green tile edge, white bedding, dark neutral walls, warm recessed ceiling lighting, and a dark rectangular TV-like shape in the background.

Preserve the late-night private hotel-room atmosphere: polished cosplay glamour mixed with casual snapshot realism. Keep mild digital noise in the dark areas, natural fabric creases in the shiny blue satin costume, direct flash realism, slight framing imbalance, and the feeling that she had just paused by the window after dark while the city lights remained behind her.

Negative prompt: childlike face, underage, plastic skin, over-retouched, extra fingers, deformed hands, distorted anatomy, warped costume, wrong costume color, missing wrist cuffs, missing hair accessories, studio backdrop, flat lighting, overly perfect composition, AI doll face, blurred face, low-resolution artifacts.
```

```text
Create a realistic vertical 9:16 close-up phone selfie of a young adult woman in a dim private bedroom. The camera is held very close and slightly above eye level, tilted downward, capturing her from the top of her head to her upper torso. Keep the framing cramped and intimate, like a casual late-night social media selfie rather than a polished studio portrait.  She has warm bleached blonde hair with pale yellow-gold tones, airy bangs, long loose waves, and slightly messy face-framing strands. The hair should feel fluffy, dry-soft, and imperfect, with a few uneven flyaways catching the direct phone flash. Her face has a soft doll-like beauty style: very fair porcelain skin with a slight peach-pink flush, large glossy eyes, black winged eyeliner, subtle lower-lash definition, faint shimmer around the eyes, a small delicate nose, and softly blurred pink lips. Her expression is calm and restrained, almost absent-minded, with her eyes looking directly into the camera.  Her raised hand is near her mouth, with one finger touching or hovering close to the lips. The hand should be prominent in the foreground, showing long glossy black nails, thin rings, and a delicate wrist bracelet. Her visible skin includes the face, neck, collarbones, upper chest, cleavage area, shoulders near the frame edges, forearm, wrist, and fingers. The skin should look smooth and soft to the touch, like lightly powdered satin skin, not plastic-perfect. The phone flash should physically brighten the forehead, nose bridge, cheeks, fingers, and upper chest, while leaving soft shadows beneath the hair, chin, and necklaces.  She wears a low-cut layered camisole or tank-style top with a cream ribbed neckline, black strap and trim, and leopard-print accents. The upper chest and cleavage are visible because of the close downward selfie angle and the low-cut top. Layer several necklaces over the chest: pearl-like beads, black beads, metallic charms, and a large silver cross pendant. These accessories should be visually important and slightly tangled or casual, reinforcing the bedroom selfie realism.  The background should be a dark, messy bedroom or dressing-room-like space with shadowed shelves, clothing shapes, fabric clutter, and indistinct personal objects. Keep the background underexposed and slightly noisy, while the subject is abruptly brightened by direct phone flash or a small LED light from the camera direction. Use mild phone-camera softness, slight digital smoothing, compression artifacts, and low-light noise. The image should feel like it had just been taken after getting ready or after returning from a night out, carrying a quiet, intimate, slightly melancholic Y2K-gothic coquette mood.  Avoid studio lighting, clean luxury interiors, perfect symmetry, professional editorial posing, overly airbrushed skin, heavy contour, dark hair, balanced cinematic lighting, wide framing, missing jewelry, missing black nails, extra fingers, distorted hands, cartoon style, or anime style.
```

#### 30. Low-light cafe smartphone portrait

<a href="https://aiistudio.com/en/prompt/2050098347248144777?utm_source=github&utm_medium=readme&utm_campaign=prompt-link"><img src="https://cdn.aiistudio.com/twitter/2050098347248144777/0.jpg" alt="Low-light cafe smartphone portrait" width="560"></a>

<details><summary><strong>📝 Prompt</strong> (click to expand)</summary>

```text
A realistic low-light smartphone restaurant portrait of a young adult woman sitting inside a warm cafe or restaurant at night. Use a close half-body composition, close to a 4:5 or slightly square-cropped phone photo ratio. The camera is around chest-to-face height, shooting from close range at nearly eye level or slightly above. Her face, shoulders, neck, hand, and upper body fill most of the frame. Do not make it a mirror selfie, do not add a phone covering her face, and do not turn it into a bright studio portrait.

She faces the camera with a slight body turn, holding a metal fork vertically near her chin and lips, as if she paused during dinner while talking or before taking another bite. Her eyes look toward the camera with a calm, soft gaze and a slight sense of curiosity or pause. Her lips are slightly parted or naturally relaxed, with no exaggerated smile. The moment should feel like someone sitting across the table casually took the photo, natural but lightly posed.

She has deep black-brown to natural black hair, loosely tied up or half-up, with natural volume at the crown and loose face-framing strands on both sides. The hair has a soft dark sheen under warm low light, with slightly blurred edges. Loose strands rest near the cheeks and neck, adding casual restaurant realism. Preserve her soft oval face, delicate features, large eyes, natural nose bridge, and gentle lip shape. Makeup follows a warm East Asian-inspired restaurant selfie style: translucent base, natural straight brows, thin eyeliner, soft under-eye detail, light pink blush, and rose-pink or muted bean-pink lips. Keep it low-contrast, clean, and soft, without heavy makeup or commercial retouching.

She wears a white thin-strap camisole top with lace trim, a small bow at the neckline, and tiny floral or dotted details, layered with a warm cream or ivory loose knit cardigan. The cardigan has visible vertical or open-knit texture and slips slightly off the shoulder, revealing the thin strap. The fabric should feel soft, warm, and textured; the cardigan shows fuzzy knit detail under warm light, while the camisole looks lighter and more delicate.

Visible skin includes the face, neck, collarbone area, upper shoulders, a small upper-chest edge, hands, and wrists. Waist, abdomen, back, hips, and legs are not visible or covered by clothing. Her skin tone is light warm ivory to soft beige-apricot, appearing creamy and warm under yellow restaurant lighting. The skin on the face, shoulders, neck, and collarbone should look delicate, soft, and slightly translucent, feeling warm, clean, and lightly moisturized to the touch. Keep subtle low-light tonal shifts, soft pores, and natural shadows; avoid excessive smoothing or plastic skin.

The background is a nighttime restaurant, cafe, or indoor dining space decorated with plants. Include dense dark green indoor plants, warm yellow background lights, wooden partitions or window-like frames, softly blurred restaurant seating, dark wall surfaces, and subtle woven chair texture. The main light comes from warm yellow restaurant ceiling lamps and background lights, scattering from above and slightly behind, with weak environmental bounce from the front. It creates soft highlights on the forehead, nose bridge, cheeks, collarbone, and shoulders. Plants and dark background areas absorb some of the light, creating warm shadows around the skin edges. Background lamps filtered through plant leaves form soft yellow light spots and irregular leaf shadows.

Keep a low-light smartphone texture: soft edges, mild shadow noise, warm film-like grain, subtle haze, and slight compression. The face, hand, and fork are relatively clear, while background plants and warm lights are softly blurred. The overall mood is gentle, quiet, intimate, and warmly hazy, like she had been sitting in the restaurant for a while, holding a fork, pausing mid-conversation, and looking up at the photographer just as the photo was taken.
```

</details>

She is wearing a dramatic, high-volume couture gown made of layered tulle in pastel purple shades, creating a dreamy, cloud-like silhouette.
The model is holding a bouquet of lush purple flowers (roses, peonies, lilacs) with soft bokeh effect. Her hair is styled in a loose, romantic updo with soft strands framing her face. Subtle glamorous makeup, glossy lips, and soft blush.
Large bold magazine title "BONANZA" in thick, elegant serif font placed behind the model's head, partially obscured. Clean editorial layout with realistic magazine typography.
Add side cover text in refined fashion magazine style:
"The New Romance"
"Beauty in Bloom"
"Dress to Dream"
"10 Ways to Elevate Your Style"
"Special Feature: The Art of Slow Fashion"
Include barcode, date (May issue), and tagline at bottom: "Live Beautifully – Fashion that inspires, empowers & transforms."

#### 34. Formal business profile headshot

<a href="https://aiistudio.com/en/prompt/2049779470144552976?utm_source=github&utm_medium=readme&utm_campaign=prompt-link"><img src="https://cdn.aiistudio.com/twitter/2049779470144552976/0.jpg" alt="Formal business profile headshot" width="560"></a>

<details><summary><strong>📝 Prompt</strong> (click to expand)</summary>

```text
Based on the portrait photo I upload, generate a formal business profile headshot poster. Preserve the subject's real identity features, facial proportions, face shape, and overall aura. Do not alter the subject's identity.

You may moderately refine the facial contour so that the lines look cleaner, more natural, and more photogenic. Smooth the skin texture, reduce blemishes, dullness, and uneven tone, but do not over-retouch. Keep authentic skin detail and natural lighting.

Design a business hairstyle that matches the subject's face shape. The hairstyle should be clean, mature, professional, suitable for formal occasions, with natural strands and layering, not exaggerated. Style the subject in formal business attire, for example a dark suit jacket with a white or light-colored shirt, optionally with a tie. The overall look should feel premium, minimal, professional, and trustworthy.

The shot is a frontal half-body portrait, subject centered, facing the camera, with a natural confident expression. The background is a plain solid white, lit softly and evenly, like a professional ID photo, corporate headshot, or university faculty profile portrait. Overall style: clean, formal, business, high-resolution realistic photography, square 1:1 ratio.

Reserve a clean information bar at the bottom of the image with modern minimal typography:
Name: [Yuna Koizumi]
Title: [Senior Graphic Designer]
Department / Institution: [International Design Institute]

Important text rule:
If the user's input for name, title, position, department, institution, or any other text that needs to appear on the image is in Chinese or another language, first translate it into natural, accurate, formal English, then place it on the image. Unless the user explicitly asks to keep Chinese, do not display Chinese text in the image.

Typography requirements:
The first line (name) uses dark navy bold large English text. The second and third lines use black regular-weight English text. Overall layout should reference university faculty profile pages, academic conference speaker cards, or professional business headshot posters.
```

</details>

Style & Composition: A fusion of realistic photography and abstract digital glitch art. The subject is rendered in stark black and white, set against a clean, minimalist white background.

Color Palette: Strictly monochromatic (deep blacks and bright whites) with aggressive, vibrant splashes of crimson red.

Graphic Elements: > * Glitch Effect: The back of the head and the lower torso dissolve into abstract geometric shards, pixel sorting, and "glitchy" red brushstrokes.

Texture: Gritty, ink-wash textures and distressed digital overlays that suggest a modern noir or cyberpunk editorial feel.

Lighting & Technicals: > * Lighting: Intense side-lighting (Chiaroscuro) creating deep shadows on the face to highlight bone structure.

Details: Hyper-realistic skin texture, individual hair strands visible, high-grain film aesthetic.

Framing: Vertical aspect ratio, close-up profile shot.

Aspect ratio is 9:16
```

#### 39. Editorial 3x3 beige studio grid

<a href="https://aiistudio.com/en/prompt/2049556448288407795?utm_source=github&utm_medium=readme&utm_campaign=prompt-link"><img src="https://cdn.aiistudio.com/meigen/2049556448288407795/0.jpg" alt="Editorial 3x3 beige studio grid" width="560"></a>

<details><summary><strong>📝 Prompt</strong> (click to expand)</summary>

```text
Editorial 3x3 photo grid in a clean soft beige studio. Character (matches reference 100%) wearing lightweight dark navy shirt, ivory trousers, barefoot for raw simplicity. Lighting: large diffused key light directly front-right, silver reflector left, subtle rim from top. Shots to include: 1. extreme close-up of lips + cheekbone with blurred hand partially covering (85mm, f/1.8, razor-thin DOF); 2. tight crop on eyes looking into lens with reflection of light strip visible (85mm, f/2.0); 3. black & white close portrait resting chin on fist, face filling frame (50mm, f/2.2); 4. over-shoulder shot, blurred foreground fabric curtain framing half face (85mm, f/2.0); 5. very close frontal with hands overlapping face, light streak across eyes (50mm, f/2.5); 6. tight angled portrait showing hair falling into eyes, soft-focus background (85mm, f/2.2); 7. crop of hands touching jawline, eyes cropped out (50mm, f/3.2, detail-focused); 8. half-body seated sideways on low cube, head turned sharply away, blurred foreground (35mm, f/ 4.5); 9. intense close-up of profile with single tear-like water droplet, cinematic light slice across (85mm, f/ 1.9). Angles: mostly tight headshots with slight high/low tilts, maintaining variation. Capture RAW, professional muted grade, smooth tonal contrast, subtle cinematic grain. Mood: intimate, introspective, character-led editorial minimalism with delicate use of fabric as prop.
```

</details>

#### 41. Doodle overlay photo manipulation

<a href="https://aiistudio.com/en/prompt/2049538141993001161?utm_source=github&utm_medium=readme&utm_campaign=prompt-link"><img src="https://cdn.aiistudio.com/meigen/2049538141993001161/0.jpg" alt="Doodle overlay photo manipulation" width="560"></a>

<details><summary><strong>📝 Prompt</strong> (click to expand)</summary>

```text
Analyze the uploaded image and preserve the original subject, composition, and lighting. Do not alter the identity or structure of the main subject. Add playful, hand-drawn doodles that interact directly with the subject in the image. The doodles should mimic, follow, or exaggerate the shapes, gestures, or motion present-such as outlining poses, extending limbs, adding motion lines, or creating imaginative elements that

"respond" to the subject.

Ensure the doodles feel naturally integrated into the scene, as if they were drawn on top of the photo with intention.

Use a sketchy, imperfect, hand-drawn style with organic lines, slightly uneven strokes, and a casual illustrated feel.

Include whimsical handwritten text elements placed around the image. The text should match the mood or implied context of the scene, with a playful and spontaneous tone.

Avoid fixed phrases-generate context-aware, creative, and humorous text that fits each unique image. Maintain a balanced composition so the doodles enhance the image without overwhelming the original subject. Keep the overall aesthetic fun, expressive, and social-media-ready. High resolution, clean overlay, vibrant yet natural color harmony.
```

</details>

She is holding a peach with water droplets in both hands, the peach close to her lips, movement natural and restrained. In the foreground, several fresh peaches are arranged, with fine water droplets on their surface. She wears a light-colored thin-strap summer top, with cool water droplets on her shoulders and arms. Background is a summer outdoor orchard, green plants blurred, natural sunlight, shallow depth of field, creamy bokeh — overall translucent, soft, and healing.

Overall style is a high-end Japanese photo-magazine cover with realistic photographic quality, true skin texture, soft cinematic feel, fruit-themed beauty editorial. Add refined Japanese magazine typography: small text at top "みずみずしい夏、桃とまなざし。", main title "桃色日和", subtitle "MOMOIRO BIYORI", right-side vertical copy "甘い季節は、そっと頬を染めていく。", left-side copy "やわらかな光、透きとおる空気、ひとくちの夏。", a circular badge at bottom-left "Summer Issue", description "Beauty & Mood Editorial", a large year "2026", small text at bottom "この一枚に、夏の記憶を。" Text color in cream white or light gold, restrained and high-end layout — like a real Japanese fashion-lifestyle magazine cover.

No garbled text. No vulgarity. No plastic skin. No deformed hands. No cheap-poster feel. No cluttered background. No over-sharpening. No watermarks.

- “Why It’s Trending” (short text blocks)

CENTER PANEL (Page 2):

  2. Cook egg or tofu

- Four variation cards with small photos (protein add-on, spicy version, fresh version, fermented version)

- Small cultural influence note (Korea, Japan, India) in a clean row
- A refined quote at the bottom in italic font

Aspect ratio: wide horizontal, 3-panel layout.

#### 55. Japanese arcade fighting

<a href="https://aiistudio.com/en/prompt/awesome-comparison-75?utm_source=github&utm_medium=readme&utm_campaign=prompt-link"><img src="https://cdn.aiistudio.com/awesome-gpt2/comparison/75.jpg" alt="Japanese arcade fighting" width="560"></a>

<details><summary><strong>📝 Prompt</strong> (click to expand)</summary>

```text
Create a hyper-detailed comedic Japanese arcade fighting game screenshot styled like a versus battle scene, using a real-world photo aesthetic with game UI overlaid on top. The scene shows an intense mock battle between two groups of theme-park fans competing for the front row at an outdoor show plaza in Tokyo DisneySea. Use a wide 16:9 composition. In the background, clearly show Mediterranean Harbor and Mount Prometheus under bright daytime skies, with the waterfront and DisneySea architecture visible. In the foreground, show exactly 10 young adult people in winter casual clothing, split into 2 opposing teams of 5, physically leaning, grabbing, reaching, and shoving in a tug-of-war-like scrum over position, with exaggerated competitive body language and frozen action as if in a fighting game. Faces should be anonymized with soft blurred blocks. Add floating character labels above each person with levels and names in Japanese. The overall tone is absurdly realistic, like a real candid photo transformed into a polished arcade game battle screen.

Add a full Japanese fighting-game HUD with glossy blue-versus-red interface styling. At the very top, place a center stage title bar reading 'Tokyo DisneySea Mickey Plaza Show Front-Row Battle' and a large timer in the middle reading 'TIME 89.' In the top left, add a blue team header 'PLAYER1' and team name 'Hardcore Front-Row Squad A.' In the top right, add a red team header 'RIVAL' and team name 'Rival Group B.' On the left side, stack exactly 5 blue player status panels with portraits, level, Japanese class-like nicknames, HP, SP, and BURST meters. The 5 left-side labels are: 'Lv.25 Hardcore Leader Yuki,' 'Lv.24 Muscle Man Takeshi,' 'Lv.23 Glasses Otaku Shinji,' 'Lv.23 Max-Adrenaline Kent,' 'Lv.22 Support Ryo.' On the right side, stack exactly 5 red rival status panels with the labels: 'Lv.27 Rival Leader Daiki,' 'Lv.26 Powerhouse Masaru,' 'Lv.24 Strategist Koji,' 'Lv.23 Hot-Blood Riku,' 'Lv.22 Support Girl Saki.' Each panel should include numeric HP and SP values and segmented BURST gauges, styled like a Japanese arcade RPG-fighter interface.

Place exactly 10 in-battle nameplates above the fighters in the center scene, color-coded blue for the left team and red for the right team. The 10 labels are: 'Lv.24 Takeshi,' 'Lv.25 Yuki,' 'Lv.23 Shinji,' 'Lv.23 Kent,' 'Lv.22 Ryo,' 'Lv.27 Daiki,' 'Lv.26 Masaru,' 'Lv.23 Riku,' 'Lv.22 Saki,' 'Lv.22 Misaki.'

At the lower left, add a skill menu titled 'Skills' listing exactly 5 skills with SP costs: 'Dash Charge SP 20,' 'Shoulder-Push Snatch SP 25,' 'Bag-Lock Position SP 15,' 'Rope Duck SP 10,' 'Real Grit SP 50.' Beneath that, add a dark description box explaining the highlighted skill 'Real Grit' with the Japanese text: 'Intimidate opponents with sheer guts and shove them aside! For a set time, opponents stagger more easily! (Consumes a large amount of Burst gauge.) Duration: 10 seconds.'

At the bottom center, add an item menu titled 'Items' with exactly 5 item slots showing icons and counts: a water bottle 'x3,' a folded purple towel 'x2,' a blue drawstring bag 'x1,' a gray backpack 'x1,' and a boxed meal 'x2.' At the lower right, add a quest panel titled 'Quest' with the mission text 'Hold the front row until the show starts!' and condition text 'Condition: Push the entire rival group to the back!' and countdown text 'Show starts in: 02:30.' Beside it, add a mini-map titled 'Mickey Plaza MAP' showing red and blue dots for both teams in the plaza. Along the very bottom edge, include small controller prompts in Japanese for actions such as skill use, item use, grab/push, and dash.

Use dramatic, saturated lighting, crisp detail, realistic clothing folds, authentic plaza stone pavement, and a high-end Japanese game screenshot look. The image should feel like a ridiculous but believable crossover between a real Tokyo DisneySea crowd photo and a competitive arcade battle game interface.
```

</details>

#### 58. East Asian art portrait

<a href="https://aiistudio.com/en/prompt/awesome-comparison-66?utm_source=github&utm_medium=readme&utm_campaign=prompt-link"><img src="https://cdn.aiistudio.com/awesome-gpt2/comparison/66.jpg" alt="East Asian art portrait" width="560"></a>

<details><summary><strong>📝 Prompt</strong> (click to expand)</summary>

```text
9:16 vertical composition, single-person female art portrait, young East Asian woman with delicate features, soft facial lines, naturally translucent skin retaining real texture, quiet premium temperament with a hint of detachment and story.
Studio style fused with natural light, soft side light, fine highlights on the face, gentle shadows, overall translucent non-glaring light with a subtle dark-fog filter — slightly hazy, slightly luminous, strong air feel.
Minimalist clean background — cream gray, off-white, pale khaki, or foggy warm gray wall — with large negative space; the image is concise with breathing room.
The model sits on the floor or a low platform, one leg naturally bent and one relaxed extended; body slightly leaning forward or sideways, asymmetric shoulders, head tilted slightly, posture natural and relaxed, not posed.
Expression calm and restrained, gaze soft and slightly distant with a hint of pensiveness, lips naturally parted or lightly closed; mood languid, quiet, delicate.
Hair is naturally voluminous long hair, slightly messy with stray strands, soft and airy with layered texture — like just-tidied yet naturally casual.

The image emphasizes delicate texture, soft tones, a fusion of light French and Korean magazine feel, real photographic quality, cinematic skin tones, abundant detail, clear hierarchy, restrained composition, premium aesthetic, fashion editorial portrait, soft cinematic portraiture, fine texture, ultra-high detail, photorealistic, elegant, refined, high-end fashion photography, understated sensuality, concise composition.

A huge lotus flower acts as a spatial container, growing naturally from a calm water surface, slightly tilted; composition elegant with ample negative space.

Overall lighting translucent, clean, layered, no gray fog, no flatness. Premium CG commercial illustration, cinematic real lighting, high dynamic range, ultra-fine, 8K detail, ArtStation-level quality, strong color separation, clean grading, teal-orange contrast, warm highlights, cool shadows. Only the city lights enhance saturation. Color tone soft and translucent, lighting sharp and bright. No gray fog, no dim depths, no low-saturation atomization.

```text
A stylish young woman with {argument name="hair style" default="long wavy blonde hair"}, defined cheekbones, and a confident expression, wearing black sunglasses and a {argument name="clothing" default="thick white puffer jacket"} over a fitted black top, standing confidently in front of a {argument name="car" default="vibrant hot-pink Ford Mustang"}. She is posing with one hand slightly raised near her chest, exuding effortless attitude and elegance. In the lower center, create a section titled 'Major Works Constellation' with a dark brushstroke heading. Label the 5 nodes: Abi Sword, Heroes of the Eastern Zhou, Assassin Biographies, Magical Super Asia, Game character design legacy. Each circle contains a distinct monochrome or muted-color ink illustration, with subtle connecting marks like a constellation diagram. At the lower right, add a section titled 'Studio Notes' containing exactly 6 visible objects: 4 hanging calligraphy brushes, 1 ink bowl, and 1 painter's palette with blue and red pigment; beneath them place a sketchbook page with light pencil figure studies. Across the bottom, add a wide section titled 'Why He Matters' with a black brushstroke header and smaller Chinese subtitle text, followed by a paragraph of serif body text in English describing his importance to comics, painting, calligraphy, cinema, and epic storytelling. Use a restrained palette of sepia, black ink, off-white paper, muted gray, with small accents of deep red and occasional blue. The whole image should feel like a refined cultural tribute poster, dense but balanced, highly detailed, painterly, and authentic to Chinese ink aesthetics.

#### 88. Photorealistic magazine

<a href="https://aiistudio.com/en/prompt/awesome-poster-62?utm_source=github&utm_medium=readme&utm_campaign=prompt-link"><img src="https://cdn.aiistudio.com/awesome-gpt2/poster/62.jpg" alt="Photorealistic magazine" width="560"></a>

<details><summary><strong>📝 Prompt</strong> (click to expand)</summary>

```text
Aspect Ratio: 9:16 Vertical

【IDENTITY & REALISM (CRITICAL PRIORITY)】

The subject is an adult female whose facial features and bone structure must 100% perfectly match the provided FACE_REF image. Eye spacing, nose bridge, jawline, and cheekbone structure must be exact; no identity drift is allowed. Skin texture must be photorealistic, showing pores and fine details—do not over-smooth or apply an Instagram filter look.

【PHOTOGRAPHY & CINEMATOGRAPHY】

A high-end editorial fashion photograph with a cinematic quality, rivaling covers of Vogue, Harper’s Bazaar, or ELLE.

Lens & Focus: Use an 85mm lens (for medium shot) or 50mm/70mm (for full body) with a shallow depth of field. The subject's eyes must be perfectly sharp.

Lighting: Natural winter daylight supplemented by soft, professional fill light. Gold ornaments and precious stones should have realistic specular highlights without being blown out. Embroidery textures must be incredibly sharp and tactile.

Color Grading: Rich, cinematic colors. The red walls and the attire's main color must be distinct and clean, not muddy. The overall image should feel deep, textured, and expensive.

Composition: A clean magazine cover layout with deliberate negative space at the top or sides for typography. No torn paper or hand-drawn effects.

【SETTING: FORBIDDEN CITY WINTER】

The location is a red-walled long corridor in the Beijing Forbidden City.

Environment: Visible details include vermilion walls, red pillars, intricate carved windows, and painted wooden beams with strong perspective depth. The scene must be clean: no tourists, modern signs, or watermarks.

Weather Condition (Selected Randomly):

[If Snowfall selected]: Fine snowflakes are gently falling.

[If Post-Snow selected]: The air is crisp and clear, with remnant snow on the eaves and steps.

【WARDROBE: MING DYNASTY HEAVY INDUSTRY COUTURE】

The subject wears opulent, multi-layered Ming Dynasty ceremonial Hanfu. The aesthetic is gold-heavy, dense tassels, phoenix crown, large-area woven gold embroidery, complex layering, dignified and luxurious.

Structure: A visible, crisp white standing inner collar provides a clean boundary. Over this is a structured duijin ao (jacket) with wide sleeves, topped by a heavy xiapei/pibo (stole) structure held by a large central yajin ornament.

Fabric & Craft: The main fabric is real zhijin jin (woven gold brocade) with palpable fiber texture. The embroidery is heavy industry—using panjin goldwork, couched gold
```

</details>

#### 111. Vintage newspaper front page

<a href="https://aiistudio.com/en/prompt/awesome-portrait-19?utm_source=github&utm_medium=readme&utm_campaign=prompt-link"><img src="https://cdn.aiistudio.com/awesome-gpt2/portrait/19.jpg" alt="Vintage newspaper front page" width="560"></a>

<details><summary><strong>📝 Prompt</strong> (click to expand)</summary>

```text
Create the most realistic front page design of a vintage newspaper featuring the main character. The layout should be made in the style of a real printed newspaper with a cinematic black-and-white aesthetic.
The main photo should be prominently placed in the center, framed, like the image in the title of the article. The subject in the photo should remain unchanged and clearly distinguishable in natural light and slightly increased contrast in order to match the spectacular editorial style.
Create a bold, attention-grabbing headline at the top (create a unique title that matches the spirit of the photo - it can be romantic, mysterious, funny, or dramatic). Add a smaller subtitle under it, which will look like a real newspaper caption.
Add realistic newspaper elements:
Columns of small text (in the style of lorem ipsum, but framed like real news)
At the top is the fictitious name of the publication (for example, The Daily Prompts, AI Times or similar - think creatively, according to the picture)
Date, issue number and location
Decorative lines, dividers, and vintage typography
Small additional articles or captions to the main image
Optional stamps, doodles, or editorial notes to add personality.
Style:
Black and white or slightly faded monochrome paper
Fine paper texture, grain, and ink defects
Small shadows and creases that mimic real printed paper
The aesthetics of a clean but slightly worn vintage newspaper
Mood: Give the design personality, expressiveness and plot, as if the plot is part of the main article.
Aspect ratio: 4:5 or 1:1
High-detail, ultra-realistic hybrid of editorial photography and print design.
```

</details>

<a href="https://aiistudio.com/en/prompt/awesome-portrait-9?utm_source=github&utm_medium=readme&utm_campaign=prompt-link"><img src="https://cdn.aiistudio.com/awesome-gpt2/portrait/9.jpg" alt="7/10 body young woman portrait" width="560"></a>

<details><summary><strong>📝 Prompt</strong> (click to expand)</summary>

```text
The image is a medium close-up shot at eye level, focused on a young woman. She is shown in a 7/10 body shot, sitting with the body slightly tilted, hips pushed back, legs naturally crossed (left leg in front, right leg behind), knees slightly bent. The upper body is twisted to the right and back, with the head turned toward the camera in a classic 'glance back' pose, looking directly at the camera with a clear, slightly playful gaze. Her hair is fluffy brown bob length to the shoulder, with naturally falling bangs and slightly curled ends; makeup is light and natural, with only slight eyeliner on the eyes and natural nude pink lips. The image uses a natural daylight filter overall, light slants in from the upper-left, forming a soft backlit silhouette; the right side of the face and body is lit by warm golden light, while the left side has a natural shadow transition, enhancing the three-dimensional feel. Lighting is bright natural light with slight lens flare, evoking the atmosphere of an afternoon sun. The angle is eye-level; in composition the subject is positioned slightly right of center, with crosswalk lines and road lines in the background forming natural leading lines toward the figure. Background is a city street with road, crosswalk, green belt, and distant vehicles, moderately blurred but still recognizable as trees, guardrails, parked e-bikes, etc. The composition uses the rule of thirds; the figure is positioned at the right one-third, enhancing balance. The subject wears an army-green camo-pattern hoodie, paired with black shorts, white high-top sneakers, and white mid-length socks. The backpack is black with orange-yellow stripe accents and an orange plush charm; material is canvas and leather. Overall style is street casual, body language relaxed and natural, expression slightly curious and playful, presenting a casual, youthful, energetic urban-girl image.
```

</details>

      "floating_animation": "translucent hearts floating up the right edge"
    },
    "bottom_bar": {
      "input_field": "'Say something...'",
      "icons": ["smiley face", "three dots", "shopping cart", "gift box", "share"]
    }
  }
}

Lighting is [LIGHTING_DIRECTION_AND_QUALITY], creating luminous highlights on [HIGHLIGHT_AREAS] and soft shadows for depth. The color palette blends [COLOR_PALETTE], with [REFLECTION_OR_GLOW_DETAILS] enhancing the product’s luxury feel.

Photorealistic commercial beauty photography, ultra-detailed skin texture, shallow depth of field, polished studio/editorial composition, premium cosmetic advertising aesthetic, high-resolution, 8k detail.

[MODEL_DESCRIPTION]: age, ethnicity, hair, facial features

[BACKGROUND_DESCRIPTION]: grey studio, teal garden, soft gradient

[PRODUCT_DESCRIPTION]: serum bottle, cream jar, pump bottle
[PRODUCT_PLACEMENT]: beside cheek, foreground, under chin
[HAND_POSE_DETAILS]: graceful fingers, natural nails, elegant support
[MATERIALS_AND_COLORS]: amber glass, frosted glass, gold accents
[LIGHTING_DIRECTION_AND_QUALITY]: warm diffused, cool botanical beam
[COLOR_PALETTE]: amber, gold, grey, teal, soft white

#### 135. Eastern emotion neo-Chinese poster

<a href="https://aiistudio.com/en/prompt/2048798194348515567?utm_source=github&utm_medium=readme&utm_campaign=prompt-link"><img src="https://cdn.aiistudio.com/meigen/2048798194348515567/0.jpg" alt="Eastern emotion neo-Chinese poster" width="560"></a>

<details><summary><strong>📝 Prompt</strong> (click to expand)</summary>

```text
You are a high-end Eastern emotional visual generation system.

Goal: translate '[emotion name]: [name]' into an Eastern visual poster with philosophical depth and resonance.

Before generating, perform the following logic (implicitly):

1. Explain the essence of the emotion in one plain sentence
2. Determine its category: cycle / stagnation / collapse / pulling / hollow
3. Translate this mechanism into an Eastern visual metaphor structure (rather than directly drawing the emotion)

——————————————————

[Overall style]

Neo-Chinese minimalism
restrained
negative space
poetic storytelling
luxury oriental editorial

Aspect ratio: 9:16 vertical

Background:
rice-paper white (#F5F0E6)
very slight paper texture
negative space ≥ 50%

——————————————————

[Composition]

Must use:
S-shaped flowing composition or diagonal composition

The image has a clear visual lead path
Structure grows naturally; no collage

——————————————————

[Core visual (emotional spatial installation)]

Build an 'emotional structural space' (not a landscape, but a materialization of the mechanism):

Auto-generate based on the emotion:

- If cycle → swirling water / rings of cloud-vapor / endless paths
- If stagnation → still water / floating objects / empty boats
- If collapse → fractured mountains / falling structures
- If pulling → silk threads / bidirectional force structures
- If hollow → empty shells / atomized space

The subject must include:

A 'tiny figure' (very critical):
- Very small in proportion (intensifying emotional pressure)
- Walking / standing / pausing / gazing
- Forms a relationship with the structure (trapped / pulled / engulfed)
- Ancient costume

——————————————————

[Material & lighting]

Materials:
water / fog / stone / rice paper / silk / metal (restrained)

Lighting:
cinematic side/back lighting
volumetric light
soft rim light

Overall lighting: restrained, real, with atmosphere

——————————————————

[Auxiliary elements (very few)]

May add:

- Cloud vapor / water lines
- Very fine gold lines (flowing)
- Vermilion seal (small)
- A single line of caption (very small)

Must integrate naturally; not UI-structured

——————————————————

[Typography]

Top-left or along the composition's flow:

Main title:
{Emotion Name}

Subtitle:
{A philosophical phrase (auto-generated)}

Thin horizontal line (very thin)

English or pinyin (optional)

Bottom:

A summary line (very restrained, not motivational chicken soup)

——————————————————

[Color]

Main colors:
ink black / deep gray

Accents:
very little gold / cyan green / indigo

Overall low saturation

——————————————————

[Quality requirements]

8K
Real materials
No plastic feel
No clutter
Clean edges

Emphasis:
spirit > detail
restraint > showboating

————
Emotion name: [name]
```

</details>

#### 137. Photo + crayon editorial

<a href="https://aiistudio.com/en/prompt/2048714101850071422?utm_source=github&utm_medium=readme&utm_campaign=prompt-link"><img src="https://cdn.aiistudio.com/meigen/2048714101850071422/0.jpg" alt="Photo + crayon editorial" width="560"></a>

<details><summary><strong>📝 Prompt</strong> (click to expand)</summary>

```text
[Theme]
{Enter theme here}

[Photo]
{Briefly describe the photo content used here}
(e.g., child playing in the park / parent and child smiling / running child, etc.)

[Title]
{Enter the title to overlay on the image}
(e.g., Children's Day / Happy Mother's Day / Beginning of Spring, etc.)

---

A lifestyle editorial visual based on the theme '{theme},' fusing photography and crayon illustration.

Use the provided photo as the main visual.

■ Scene
A natural everyday moment fitting '{photo}.'
Understated realism, soft natural light, emphasis on natural movement and emotion.

■ Composition
Place the figure as if cut out, layered onto a craft-paper background
(unbleached, beige, soft gray, milk tea).

· 50%+ negative space
· Asymmetric composition
· Airy minimalist editorial design

■ Illustration (most important)
Layer hand-drawn illustrations with a grainy, smudged, oil-pastel/crayon look.

▼ Rules
· Within 30–40% of the canvas
· Lines uneven, smudged, with paper texture
· Density varies with pressure (mix of dark and light areas)
· Slightly clumsy touch like a child's drawing
· No shadows or 3D rendering (flat)
· Linked to the figure's motion (wind, trails, flow)

▼ Motifs (theme-linked)
· Add elements symbolizing {theme} in crayon style
(e.g., Children's Day → carp streamers, wind, sky, grass, clouds, paper helmets)
· Wind lines, motion lines, small icons, sun, clouds, flowers, hearts, stars, zigzag movement
· Convey atmosphere with rough crayon strokes

■ Title text (important)
Place '{title}' in handwritten crayon lettering inside the image.
· Position: top-left or top-right negative-space area
· Crayon-like grainy, smudged letters
· Slightly clumsy, characterful handwriting
· Letter color: pick from earth tones (terracotta, mustard, dark brown)
· Modest, minimalist size (the photo is the hero)
· No decorative frames, flat

■ Color
Warm earth tones,
soft muted colors
(terracotta, mustard, olive, milk tea, soft blue)

■ Mood
Warm, nostalgic, child-hearted, handmade feel,
tender, emotional, story-rich daily life

■ Style
Picture-book warmth × Nordic minimalism × premium lifestyle ad

■ Quality
High resolution, commercial-level quality
```

</details>

#### 154. Editorial style character desi

<a href="https://aiistudio.com/en/prompt/2047207812800147647?utm_source=github&utm_medium=readme&utm_campaign=prompt-link"><img src="https://pub-7fa6f15e4f0b4ba098adc8cf77f2475c.r2.dev/meigen/2047207812800147647/0.jpg" alt="Editorial style character desi" width="560"></a>

<details><summary><strong>📝 Prompt</strong> (click to expand)</summary>

```text
Create the most realistic front page design of a vintage newspaper featuring the main character. The layout should be made in the style of a real printed newspaper with a cinematic black-and-white aesthetic.
The main photo should be prominently placed in the center, framed, like the image in the title of the article. The subject in the photo should remain unchanged and clearly distinguishable in natural light and slightly increased contrast in order to match the spectacular editorial style.
Create a bold, attention-grabbing headline at the top (create a unique title that matches the spirit of the photo - it can be romantic, mysterious, funny, or dramatic). Add a smaller subtitle under it, which will look like a real newspaper caption.
Add realistic newspaper elements:
Columns of small text (in the style of lorem ipsum, but framed like real news)
At the top is the fictitious name of the publication (for example, “The Daily Prompts”, “AI Times” or similar - think creatively, according to the picture)
Date, issue number and location
Decorative lines, dividers, and vintage typography
Small additional articles or captions to the main image
Optional stamps, doodles, or editorial notes to add personality.
Style:
Black and white or slightly faded monochrome paper
Fine paper texture, grain, and ink defects
Small shadows and creases that mimic real printed paper
The aesthetics of a clean but slightly worn vintage newspaper
Mood: Give the design personality, expressiveness and plot, as if the plot is part of the main article.
Aspect ratio: 4:5 or 1:1
High-detail, ultra-realistic hybrid of editorial photography and print design.
```

</details>

Behind her shoulders, large sculptural fabric rises like rose petals — same architectural drama as reference. She leans slightly forward, both hands resting gently on her knees.
Background: Pure soft warm white/ivory background — completely clean, minimal, high-end studio editorial. Soft diffused light, no harsh shadows.
Typography — placed EXACTLY like ELLE magazine reference:
Top: "LUMIÈRE" massive serif, platinum/silver, overlapping model's head slightly
Left mid: "GRACE & POWER" bold serif, then smaller below "THE NEW VISION OF LUXURY"
Right mid: "TIMELESS & FEARLESS" bold, then "PURE OPULENCE" smaller below
Bottom right large: "ICONIC & UNSTOPPABLE" elegant large serif
All text in deep charcoal/dark navy. Font style: classic high fashion serif — same weight, spacing, and elegance as ELLE. Text naturally integrated into the composition, NOT floating randomly.
Ultra photorealistic, 8K, real magazine cover quality, perfect typography placement, vertical 9:13 format.
```

</details>

```text

She has bright green or hazel eyes that are sharp and captivating, with long, curled eyelashes. Her eyebrows are thick, dark, and naturally textured, and she wears very sharp winged eyeliner. She has a small silver nose piercing on one side only.

Her skin is fair with natural freckles clearly visible across her nose and cheeks, and the skin texture should look realistic and smooth. Her lips are full and have a natural nude pink color. Her hair is dark, either black or dark brown, with a few loose strands intentionally falling across her face. She is wearing small gold hoop earrings.

The lighting is the most important element, using a dramatic slit lighting or chiaroscuro style. A sharp beam of cool-toned, slightly bluish light highlights her left eye, part of her nose, and her lips, while the right side of her face and the background are immersed in deep shadow.

The overall mood should feel cinematic, mysterious, moody, aesthetic, and intimate. Ensure that the face is 100% identical to the provided reference.
```

</details>

<a href="https://aiistudio.com/en/prompt/2043539455131459957?utm_source=github&utm_medium=readme&utm_campaign=prompt-link"><img src="https://cdn.aiistudio.com/meigen/2043539455131459957/0.jpg" alt="Wes anderson palette king" width="560"></a>

<details><summary><strong>📝 Prompt</strong> (click to expand)</summary>

```text
A retro-inspired studio photoshoot featuring a young woman styled in four different personas, arranged in a horizontal split-panel composition. Each panel has a bold pastel background in contrasting colors (yellow, blue, pink, mint). The same woman appears in each panel wearing vintage 1960s fashion with bright patterns, pink knee-high socks, and expressive makeup.
Panel 1 (Office theme): She sits behind a desk with office props like folders, a rotary phone, and stationery, wearing a patterned dress and looking surprised while holding the phone.
Panel 2 (Travel theme): She wears a wide-brim hat and colorful outfit, sitting with a vintage suitcase and travel accessories, posing elegantly.
Panel 3 (Sports theme): She wears a sporty retro outfit, holding a tennis racket and ball, sitting casually with playful energy.
Panel 4 (Home theme): She wears a robe with hair rollers, holding a hand mirror, sitting at a vanity table with beauty items.
Each panel is cleanly divided, perfectly symmetrical, with consistent lighting and camera angle. Bright, soft studio lighting, high fashion editorial style, ultra-sharp, vibrant colors, minimal shadows, no text, no logos, no labels, no watermarks.
Style: vintage pop art, Wes Anderson symmetry, fashion editorial photography, pastel color blocking, high resolution, 8k, clean composition.
```

</details>

#### 175. Editorial style glowing turtle

<a href="https://aiistudio.com/en/prompt/2043495375395525118?utm_source=github&utm_medium=readme&utm_campaign=prompt-link"><img src="https://cdn.aiistudio.com/meigen/2043495375395525118/0.jpg" alt="Editorial style glowing turtle" width="560"></a>

<details><summary><strong>📝 Prompt</strong> (click to expand)</summary>

```text
A bold, high-contrast studio photoshoot featuring a woman with the uploaded face as reference, celebrating her 23th birthday in a dramatic black-on-black setup. The subject sits elegantly on a matte black cube, leaning slightly forward with poise, one elbow resting on her knee while holding a sleek black cake with a glossy mirror glaze that reflects the studio lights.

She wears an all-black, fashion-forward outfit—such as a fitted turtleneck or a structured dress paired with a tailored blazer—styled with sophistication and edge. Accessories include a delicate yet striking silver chain, statement earrings, and a luxury watch, adding a refined, feminine power aesthetic.

The cake is topped with metallic silver candles shaped “23,” glowing brightly and serving as a subtle secondary light source that enhances the mood.

The background is a deep black seamless studio backdrop, softly illuminated with a controlled gradient that transitions from dark gray to pure black, creating depth without distraction.

The lighting is cinematic and directional, featuring a strong key light from one side to sculpt her facial features with sharp, dramatic shadows, complemented by a subtle backlight to create elegant rim highlights along her silhouette. A faint haze adds atmosphere and enhances the visibility of light beams.

Captured with an 85mm lens in a medium close-up composition, with a shallow depth of field that sharply focuses on her eyes and the reflective cake surface, allowing the rest to fall into a soft, cinematic blur.

8K resolution, ultra-detailed, sharp focus, high dynamic range, moody studio photography with a powerful, confident, and feminine editorial aesthetic.
```

</details>

```text
A dynamic full-body urban illustration of a man (use the exact face from the provided reference image, ensuring high facial accuracy and identity preservation). He wears an oversized white hoodie with subtle black and red accents, paired with loose white track pants and bold, eye-catching white sneakers.
The character has a sharp, confident gaze directed forward, conveying intensity and self-assurance. The composition is captured from a dramatic low-angle perspective, emphasizing power and dominance. His stance is strong and grounded, with exaggerated perspective on the sneakers in the foreground for added depth.
Surrounding him are fragmented concrete elements and subtle debris, suggesting an urban, gritty environment. The background is a clean white canvas featuring bold red paint splashes and abstract geometric shapes, creating a modern street-art aesthetic.
The visual style combines crisp, clean line art with vibrant flat colors and soft cel shading for depth and dimension. The rendering should feel like a high-end urban illustration or stylized editorial artwork.
Lighting is bright, even, and diffused across the entire scene, minimizing harsh shadows while maximizing clarity and detail.
Ultra-detailed, sharp focus, 8K resolution, vertical composition
```

#### 186. Editorial style king

<a href="https://aiistudio.com/en/prompt/2041841779025019132?utm_source=github&utm_medium=readme&utm_campaign=prompt-link"><img src="https://cdn.aiistudio.com/meigen/2041841779025019132/0.jpg" alt="Editorial style king" width="560"></a>

<details><summary><strong>📝 Prompt</strong> (click to expand)</summary>

```text
ROLE & AESTHETIC:
You are a world-class editorial portrait photographer specializing in dramatic, colorful studio lighting. Your task is to create a powerful, dynamic portrait with a “heroic” feel.
IDENTITY ANCHOR (CRITICAL STRICT CONSTRAINT):
Source: Use the person from the ATTACHED REFERENCE PHOTO.
Preservation: You must keep their exact facial features, skin tone, hairstyle, and natural likeness perfectly unchanged.
Universal Application: Apply the lighting and angle to the subject regardless of gender.
WARDROBE & STYLING:
Attire: A premium Black Pique Polo Shirt
Texture: Visible cotton pique mesh texture
Fit: Fitted and sharp
Color: Deep matte black (to contrast with the bright background)
Expression: Serious, intense, focused. The subject is looking off-camera into the space above, not directly at the lens.
SCENE & COMPOSITION:
Background: A vibrant, solid orange-red backdrop. It should feature smooth, intense color gradients without any patterns, creating a “hot” atmosphere.
Camera Angle (CRITICAL): Low-angle shot (looking up at the subject). This perspective should make the subject look powerful and dominant.
Framing: Medium close-up (focus on face and shoulders).
LIGHTING (DRAMATIC & COLORFUL):
Palette: Dominated by vibrant orange and deep red hues.
Key Light: Strong, directional lighting that casts deep, dramatic shadows on the face (chiaroscuro effect), emphasizing facial structure.
Rim Light: A strong, dramatic edge light (or color cast) that separates the subject’s shoulders and head from the intensely lit background.
Mood: Mysterious, intense, high-contrast studio aesthetic.
TECHNICAL QUALITY:
Style: Photorealistic, highly detailed.
Texture: Sharp focus on the face, contrasting with the smooth gradients of the background.
Skin: Retain natural pores and texture.
```

</details>

```text
Create a Portrait Master Object: Two passport-sized photo prints held side-by-side by a person's thumb and index finger.

**Clothing:** Both subjects in the photo wear formal and neat white collared shirts.
**Male Subject (Left Photo):** Make his face and hair 100% similar to the given reference.
He poses as if talking into a white paper cup, with a cheerful laughing expression.
**Female Subject (Right Photo):** Make her face and hair 100% similar to the given reference.
She poses as if holding a white paper cup to her ear, listening. Her expression is funny with a wide smile and a slightly stuck-out tongue.
**Interactive Prop:** There is a white string coming out from under the male's paper cup and connecting to the female's paper cup. Because the two photos are placed next to each other, this prop creates the illusion of a "string phone" connecting the two photos.

#### 193. Over-the-shoulder ethereal

<a href="https://aiistudio.com/en/prompt/2041379629668446277?utm_source=github&utm_medium=readme&utm_campaign=prompt-link"><img src="https://cdn.aiistudio.com/meigen/2041379629668446277/0.jpg" alt="Over-the-shoulder ethereal" width="560"></a>

<details><summary><strong>📝 Prompt</strong> (click to expand)</summary>

```text
Create a moody, ethereal cinematic portrait of a woman with a dramatic over-the-shoulder pose.

1. Pose and Expression
• Perspective: subject positioned with her back facing the camera, torso elegantly twisted, looking back over her shoulder, creating a graceful curve along the spine and highlighting shoulder blades
• Gaze: direct eye contact with the camera, piercing yet soft expression, chin slightly tucked toward shoulder to evoke intimacy and mystery
• Hand Placement: hands gently raised near chest/shoulder, fingers softly interlaced or delicately touching
• Hair: loose messy bun with soft wispy strands falling naturally across the face, slightly windswept look

2. Lighting and Color Palette
• Lighting: strong side lighting, warm golden-hour sunlight, high contrast chiaroscuro effect, one side illuminated while the other fades into deep shadow
• Skin Tone: luminous, glowing, pearlescent skin texture
• Color Scheme: earthy muted tones, deep greens, dark browns, soft neutral background, warm skin tones as focal point

3. Wardrobe and Accessories
• Outfit: backless silky dress or top, smooth light fabric, paired with dark voluminous sleeves for strong texture contrast
• Accessories: elegant drop pearl earrings reflecting light subtly

4. Composition and Atmosphere
• Framing: medium close-up shot, framed naturally with blurred foreground leaves for a voyeuristic, through-the-foliage effect
• Depth of Field: shallow depth of field, sharp focus on face, soft bokeh in background and foreground
• Mood: cinematic, melancholic, romantic, high-fashion editorial style, soft dreamy atmosphere

Face reference: soft oval face, smooth glowing skin, symmetrical features, natural makeup, gentle but expressive eyes, slightly parted lips
```

</details>
